name: Mani Library
tagline: A quiet place to read, study, and grow — open 24/7.
shortDescription: A modern self-study library and reading hall in the heart of Madhubani — air-conditioned, distraction-free, and open round the clock.

facilities.title: Air Conditioned Hall
facilities.description: Climate-controlled rooms keep you comfortable through every season.

facilities.title: Open 24 / 7
facilities.description: Study late, study early — your seat is yours, any hour of the day.

facilities.title: High-speed Wi-Fi
facilities.description: Stable fibre internet across every corner for online learning.

facilities.title: Personal Power Outlet
facilities.description: Every cabin has its own socket and reading light.

facilities.title: Personal Lockers
facilities.description: Lockable storage so you can leave your books and belongings safely.

facilities.title: RO Water & Pantry
facilities.description: Filtered drinking water, tea/coffee corner and clean washrooms.

facilities.title: Pin-drop Silent Zone
facilities.description: Acoustic-treated cabins for deep, focused study sessions.

facilities.title: Discussion Room
facilities.description: Bookable rooms for group study and mock interviews.

plans.name: Half Day
features: Choice of morning or evening shift
